reviews.comment:
Soy socio del ACA hace 20 años. Eso lo dice todo. En esta sucursal cargué sólo una vez y la atención fue ágil y buena

(Translated by Google)
I've been an ACA member for 20 years. That says it all. I only filled up at this branch once, and the service was quick and good.

reviews.comment:
Increible que una estacion de servicio tan importante no acepte tarjeta visa. Y encima no te avisan antes de cargar. Cuidado con eso. Les recomiendo que busquen otra estación

(Translated by Google)
It's unbelievable that such a major gas station doesn't accept Visa. And on top of that, they don't even warn you before you fill up. Be careful with that. I recommend you look for another station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvOXZDN3J3RRAB
